name: Crock Pot Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground meat and onion in a skillet over medium heat until no longer pink.
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. In the crockpot, add the cooked meat mixture.
4. Add the pizza sauce on top of the meat.
5. Arrange the noodles evenly across the pot.
6. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over the noodles.
7. Layer pepperoni slices over the cheese.
8. Top with additional sauce and green peppers.
9. Pour spaghetti sauce over the top layer, spreading it evenly.
10. Cover and cook on high for 30 minutes.
11. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking for 1 hour or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
This recipe can also be baked in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) until the cheese melts.
